title: Qlik Sense Proxy Session
description: A proxy session represents an authenticated user connection managed by the Qlik Sense Proxy Service. Sessions track user identity, activity timestamps, and session attributes including roles and group memberships.

userDirectory.description: Name of the user directory the session user belongs to

userId.description: User identifier within the user directory

userName.description: Display name of the session user

sessionStart.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session was created

lastActive.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last activity on this session

attributes.description: Session attributes passed from the authentication source, including roles and group memberships

SessionAttribute.description: A key-value attribute associated with a session
